title: corneria elata
intro: Corneria elata, also known as the mountain pepper, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Rutaceae. The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory activities. The health benefits of Corneria elata include its potential to aid in digestion and relieve symptoms of colds and flu, as well as its ability to reduce inflammation and fight off infections. Corneria elata can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or extracts, which are used to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health issues.
